meta.description: Optional legacy pipeline. Prefer backend in-process FAQ/escalation/LLM when BWANA_N8N_WEBHOOK_URL is empty on OCI. Escalation WAHA uses env ADMIN_ALERT_PHONE unless backend bwana_platform_config is used. Secrets via n8n env only.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chatId: ($env.ADMIN_ALERT_PHONE || '+260761359005').replace('+', '') + '@c.us', text: 'Bwana escalation from user ' + ($json.user_name || $json.user_id) + ': ' + $json.message, session: 'default' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.OPENROUTER_MODEL || $env.LLM_MODEL || 'google/gemini-2.5-flash', max_tokens: 400, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: "You are Bwana, ZedApply's chatbot career assistant for Zambian professionals. Never say you are an LLM, AI model, language model, ChatGPT, or Claude. Matching: 50% semantic + 20% skills + 15% experience + 10% location + 5% recency. Tiers: Free 10/mo, Starter K125 50/mo (no tailored CV), Professional K250 125/mo (+ tailored CV + cover letters), Super Standard K500 unlimited + Bwana Interview. Lenco MTN/Airtel payments. Daily WhatsApp digest 07:00. Keep responses under 150 words. Suggest paid features only when accurate for the user's tier." }, ...($json.history || []).map(h => ({ role: h.role, content: h.content })), { role: 'user', content: $json.message }] }) }}
